desc: Selects titleblock instances on a sheet (active sheet by default).
summary: Selects titleblock instances on a sheet (active sheet by default).
usecase: Use when you need to run this command's workflow for the current model task.
notfor: Not for bypassing model validation rules or replacing manual design judgment.
precondition: Active Revit document and required context are available.
postcondition: The command finishes with tracked success or a handled failure state.

config_inputs.name: sheetNumber
config_inputs.description: Optional target sheet number. Defaults to active sheet view.
